'''Daron''' was a young native of [[Solem]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and part of a resistance movement against the planetary [[Governor/Legends|Governor]], [[Malvander Bren]].

==History==
[[File:DaronDeath.jpg|thumb|left|Daron is killed on his [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] bike.]]
Born on [[Solem]], Daron was a member of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] underground [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] faction by [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], working alongside resistance leader and [[Poet/Legends|poet]] [[Yolan Bren]] in [[Battle of Solem|opposing]] the regime of [[Malvander Bren]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] and brother of the Rebel leader.<ref name="E7" />

Despite his youth, Daron was respected for his bravery among his compatriots, singlehandedly taking down an enemy [[skim fighter]], and providing his blood for a transfusion to save Yolan Bren's life.<ref name="E7" />

When the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] was hired by Malvander Bren to capture his brother, Daron was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by Fett in a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] chase while trying to protect his leader.<ref name="E7" />

Daron's sacrifice was remembered by his fellow members of the [[Unidentified Solem species|Solem]] resistance, with [[Ardal]] invoking his name after storming the [[Solem palace]] and rescuing Yolan Bren.<ref name="E7" />

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 7|''Empire'' 7]] {{1st}}
